sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19104" key="baqu/timos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰθύ-τῑμος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <sense id="n19104.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">βαρύτιμος.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
